sourceMovie.title: Blackhat
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Blackhat works as a crime movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The crime and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Dark Knight
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Blackhat clicked for you, The Dark Knight (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Blackhat?
faq.answer: Try The Dark Knight, Swordfish, Spy Game—each shares DNA with Blackhat while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Blackhat?
faq.answer: Blackhat (2015) is best described as Crime, Thriller, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Blackhat worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
